_comment: Owner-maintained list of cards whose IMAGE is a pre-release preview or a low-resolution placeholder pending an official high-res card. Keyed by category → slug → the note shown in the app. Overlaid onto the units/commands/upgrades stores at load (scrape-proof, like upgrade-weapons.json). The app shows an 'Unreleased / preview' badge wherever the card appears. Remove a slug here once its proper card is re-sourced (Feature 13). Reasons: roadmap-preview = cropped from an AdeptiCon 2026 announcement slide (low-res); low-res = a small official preview image; no-card = no first-party image found, still on the legacy scan.
